name: IdsDmCustSvcldCardPhnDel

text.value: WITH xfm_Businesslogic AS (SELECT @{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO) DELETE T FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ClmMartOwner}.MBRSH_DM_CLS_PLN_CUST_SVC_ID_CARD_PHN T JOIN xfm_Businesslogic X ON 1=1 WHERE T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO <> X.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
COPYRIGHT 2009 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 

                 
JOB NAME:    IdsDmCustSvcldCardPhnDel                
PROCESSING:  Use the SYSDUMMY1 table to initiate the delete statements.  Each delete statement looks for source and claim ID where the run cycle is older than the current run cycle.  These rows were not update with the current process so they don't exist in the source system anymore.
CALLED BY:  IdsMbrDmIdCardPhnCntl
